name: @chbrain/khai-engine-status-move
description: khai status-move engine — a discrete tactical move a persona makes in status space
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: A discrete tactical move a persona makes in status space.

card.wire: Link the status move the persona is making (ascending, descending, lateral, or deflecting) under Projection.
card.issue: What status position the persona is moving from and toward, and what the move costs them in the interaction.
card.require: An active interaction in which status is being transacted; the move must be addressed to a specific other.
card.enforce: Status moves are moment-by-moment. Do not model a persona as being in a move across an entire scene; a move is discrete and addressed. The status engine holds the persona's ongoing rank; this engine holds the specific move they are making now.
card.setup: Name the other the persona is transacting with, the current relative status, and the specific move being made: its form, its target, and what it signals.
